properties.name: studio.features.workspace.persistence
properties.description: Workspace persistence implementation. Version 1 supports jpa only.

properties.name: studio.features.workspace.company-required
properties.description: Require companyId when creating root workspaces. Defaults to false for legacy workspace compatibility.

properties.name: studio.features.workspace.web.public-base-path
properties.description: Authenticated user workspace API base path.

properties.name: studio.workspace.permission.inherit-parent-role
properties.description: Inherit direct roles from ancestor workspaces.

properties.name: studio.workspace.permission.deny-override-enabled
properties.description: Reserved for a future deny override feature. Must remain false in v1.
